stop.notes: string 或 array<string>，最多 4 个

docMeta.notes: 对照 docs/api/deepseek.md（2026-06-16）。frequency_penalty / presence_penalty 已 deprecated，接受但无效果。 类型字段按该渠道官方 API 原文收录。

reasoning_effort.notes: `high`, `max`. Default `high` for ordinary requests; complex agent requests may auto-use `max`. `low`/`medium` → `high`, `xhigh` → `max`.

stream_options.include_usage.notes: Extra pre-`[DONE]` chunk with full `usage` and empty `choices`.

docMeta.notes: 对照 docs/api/deepseek-message.md（2026-06-16）。temperature [0,2]；thinking.budget_tokens Ignored。 类型字段按该渠道官方 API 原文收录。

messages.notes: Anthropic Messages 格式；见 Message Fields

top_p.notes: Nucleus sampling; adjust temperature or top_p, not both

n.notes: Completions per input; near-zero temperature limits to 1

model.notes: Required. Qwen / third-party models on Bailian

stream.notes: Non-stream timeout 300s; use stream for long output

temperature.notes: See official doc for per-model defaults

max_completion_tokens.notes: Includes thinking chain; recommended for thinking models

model.notes: Qwen / DeepSeek / Kimi / GLM / MiniMax 等

max_tokens.notes: 回复上限；不限制 thinking token（由 `thinking.budget_tokens` 控制）

top_p.notes: 与 temperature 建议只设其一

output_config.notes: 结构化输出；deepseek/glm 严格 schema

tools.notes: Built-in + function tools per Bailian docs

messages.notes: OpenAPI requires at least one item

models.notes: 多模型路由列表；不可与 `fallbacks` 同用

fallbacks.notes: 主模型失败时依次尝试，最多 3 项，每项仅 `model`

provider.notes: 路由偏好（order / only / ignore 等）

session_id.notes: Sticky routing，≤256 字符；与 header `x-session-id` 冲突时 body 优先

reasoning_split.notes: Output format only; does not toggle thinking

model.notes: MiniMax-M3（多模态）或 M2.7 / M2.5 / M2.1 / M2 系列

messages.notes: M3 支持 text / image / video / tool / thinking；M2.x 仅 text / tool

thinking.notes: M3：`disabled` / `adaptive`；省略时默认 disabled；M2.x 无法关闭 thinking

parallel_tool_calls.notes: 是否支持并行 tool call

thinking_budget.notes: 推理模型思维链 token 上限

messages.notes: System / User / Assistant / Tool 消息

stream.notes: 推荐 `true` 降低超时风险

vLLM extra_body 扩展参数见 docs/api/vllm.md。

model.notes: Served model id. The docs examples commonly use Hugging Face model ids such as `NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct`.

messages.notes: OpenAI-style chat messages. The served model needs a chat template for Chat Completions.

top_k.notes: Top-k sampling; not part of core OpenAI Chat Completions.

include_stop_str_in_output.notes: Controls whether matched stop strings remain in output.

ignore_eos.notes: Continue generation after EOS when true.

truncation_side.notes: Which side to truncate when truncation is active.

echo.notes: Prepends the last message when the role matches.

add_generation_prompt.notes: Chat-template control for adding the generation prompt.

continue_final_message.notes: Allows assistant prefill / continuing the final message; cannot be combined with `add_generation_prompt`.

request_id.notes: Request id carried through inference and returned in response.

return_token_ids.notes: Adds token ids to response/chunks for debugging.

return_prompt_text.notes: Adds rendered prompt text for chat-template inspection.

cache_salt.notes: Salts prefix cache in multi-tenant deployments.

docMeta.notes: 参考基线渠道；docs/api/openai.md 含更多未列入矩阵的字段。

stream_options.include_usage.notes: Adds a final pre-`[DONE]` chunk with total usage and `choices: []`; may be missing if stream is interrupted.

stream_options.include_obfuscation.notes: Controls random `obfuscation` fields on streaming deltas.

max_completion_tokens.notes: Preferred max output limit; includes visible output tokens and reasoning tokens.

max_tokens.notes: Deprecated in favor of `max_completion_tokens`; not compatible with o-series models.

n.notes: Number of choices to generate; billed across all generated choices.

store.notes: Allows storing output for distillation/evals. Supports text and image inputs; image inputs over 8 MB may be dropped.

metadata.notes: Max 16 pairs; key max 64 chars; value max 512 chars.

user.notes: Legacy stable end-user identifier; docs say use `safety_identifier` and `prompt_cache_key` instead.

safety_identifier.notes: Stable abuse-prevention identifier; should not contain raw private user data.

prompt_cache_key.notes: Replaces `user` for cache bucketing / prompt-cache hit-rate optimization.

prompt_cache_retention.notes: `24h` enables extended prompt cache retention up to 24 hours.

temperature.notes: Docs recommend changing either `temperature` or `top_p`, not both. Reasoning-model support can differ.

seed.notes: Best-effort deterministic sampling; use `system_fingerprint` to detect backend changes.

stop.notes: Up to 4 stop sequences. Not supported with latest reasoning models `o3` and `o4-mini`.

logprobs.notes: Returns log probabilities for output tokens in `message.content` when supported.

docMeta.notes: OpenAI SDK 兼容层；多项参数文档标注为 accepted but ignored。

messages.notes: OpenAI-style chat messages are translated to Claude Messages API input.

docMeta.notes: 跨渠道推理方言探针，非单一供应商 API 文档。
